commands.repair_reason: This is security-sensitive and currently lacks required real behavior proof, so a human should require the package-transfer fix plus proof rather than sending it to automated repair.; Needs attention: The PR addresses a real authorization issue but leaves a package transfer path that can still honor stale personal-publisher membership rows.; Review finding: [P1] Guard package transfers against personal memberships —... commands.review_summary:
The branch blocks member add/update flows on personal publishers, treats `linkedUserId` as authoritative in publisher helpers, allows linked users to remove stale extra personal-publisher memberships, and adds tests/spec/changelog coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: create a user-kind source publisher with a stale admin `publisherMembers` row for a non-linked actor, then call `transferPackageOwnerForUserInternal`; `canManageSource` still becomes true through that row. I did not run it, so this is source-reproducible rather than executed.
commands.review_followup: This is security-sensitive and currently lacks required real behavior proof, so a human should require the package-transfer fix plus proof rather than sending it to automated repair.
